songs.title: Stacy's Mom
songs.album: I've Never Done Anything Like This
feed: “Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 1 spot to #1.
“Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 55 streams units.
“Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 454,258 total units.
